answers.context: Subheading: Drug information. The name of the drug is required.

answers.context: Subheading: Drug information. The strength of the drug is required.

answers.name: drug.length_of_therapy
answers.context: Subheading: Drug information. The length of therapy is required.

answers.name: drug.form

answers.name: drug.quantity
answers.context: Subheading: Drug information. The quantity of the drug is required.

answers.name: clinical.migraine_diagnosis_criteria
answers.field_label: Does the member have a diagnosis of migraine with or without aura based on International Classification of Headache Disorders (ICHD-III) diagnostic criteria?
answers.context: Subheading: Drug information. This question is part of the criteria for preventive treatment of migraine and requires a Yes or No answer.

answers.name: clinical.age_over_18
answers.field_label: Is the member ≥ 18 years of age?
answers.context: Subheading: Drug information. This question is part of the criteria for preventive treatment of migraine and requires a Yes or No answer.

answers.name: clinical.utilizing_prophylactic_modalities
answers.field_label: Has the member been utilizing prophylactic intervention modalities (for example, pharmacotherapy, behavioral therapy, physical therapy, etc.)?
answers.context: Subheading: Drug information. This question is part of the criteria for preventive treatment of migraine and requires a Yes or No answer.

answers.name: clinical.chronic_migraine_diagnosis
answers.field_label: Does the member have a diagnosis of chronic migraines defined as 15 or more headache (tension-type-like and/or migraine-like) days per month for > three months?
answers.context: Subheading: Drug information. This question is part of the criteria for preventive treatment of migraine and requires a Yes or No answer. If 'Yes', additional criteria (a, b, c, d) must also be met.

answers.name: clinical.frequent_episodic_migraine
answers.field_label: Does the member have diagnosis of frequent episodic migraines defined as at least five headache attacks lasting 4 to 72 hours (when untreated or unsuccessfully treated)?
answers.context: Subheading: Drug information. This question requires a Yes or No answer. If 'Yes', additional criteria (a, b) must also be met.

answers.name: drug.vyepti_not_in_combination_cgrp
answers.field_label: Will Vyepti not be used in combination with prophylactic calcitonin gene-related peptide (CGRP) inhibitors? (for example, erenumab, galcanezumab, fremanezumab, atogepant, rimegepant, etc.)
answers.context: Subheading: Drug information. This question requires a Yes or No answer.

answers.name: renewal.meet_initial_criteria
answers.field_label: Does the member continue to meet the initial criteria?
answers.context: Subheading: For renewal, complete the following questions to receive a 12-month approval. This question requires a Yes or No answer.

answers.name: renewal.no_unacceptable_toxicity
answers.field_label: Does the member have an absence of unacceptable toxicity from the drug?
answers.context: Subheading: For renewal, complete the following questions to receive a 12-month approval. This question requires a Yes or No answer.

answers.name: renewal.clinical_response
answers.field_label: Has the member experienced a clinical response as evidenced by:
answers.context: Subheading: For renewal, complete the following questions to receive a 12-month approval. This question requires a Yes or No answer. The response should be based on criteria a or b.

answers.name: prescriber.signature
answers.context: Subheading: Prescriber signature (required). The prescriber's signature is required to confirm the accuracy of the information provided.

answers.name: prescriber.date
answers.context: Subheading: Prescriber signature (required). The date the prescriber signed is required.
